stemHtml: IFR in IMC with procedural separation, radio fails. Passing a compulsory reporting point, what should you do?

options.a: Maintain last assigned speed/level for 10 minutes, then adjust per flight plan.
options.b: Initiate 300 ft/min climb until reaching VMC.
options.d: Maintain last assigned speed/level for 20 minutes, then adjust per flight plan.
